## [**13.1 Latar Belakang**]()  
Saat ini setiap plugin agent berjalan di goroutine terpisah dengan panic recovery (Bab 21). Namun, jika sebuah plugin terus gagal mendeteksi service (misalnya MySQL down atau uninstalled), agent akan terus mencoba tanpa henti, membuang CPU server target. Diperlukan mekanisme Circuit Breaker per plugin.  
## [**13.2 Arsitektur Circuit Breaker**]()  
**Library:** sony/gobreaker — battle-tested, generics support, digunakan luas di ekosistem Go.  
**State Machine per Plugin:**  
| | | |  
|-|-|-|  
| **State** | **Behavior** | **Transisi** |   
| CLOSED (Normal) | Plugin beroperasi normal, setiap kegagalan dicatat | Jika 5 kegagalan berturut-turut → OPEN |   
| OPEN (Backoff) | Plugin di-skip, tidak ada upaya deteksi/polling | Setelah timeout (default 60 detik) → HALF-OPEN |   
| HALF-OPEN (Probing) | 1 request percobaan diizinkan | Jika sukses → CLOSED. Jika gagal → OPEN (dengan timeout lebih lama) |   
**Exponential Backoff pada OPEN state:**  
- Pertama kali open: timeout 60 detik  
- Kedua kali open: timeout 120 detik  
- Ketiga kali: timeout 240 detik  
- Maksimum: timeout 15 menit (900 detik)  
- Reset ke 60 detik jika pernah CLOSED selama 5 menit  
## [**13.3 Integrasi dengan Plugin Manager**]()  
**Setiap plugin mendapatkan circuit breaker sendiri:**  
type ManagedPlugin struct {  
    Plugin       PluginInterface  
    CircuitBreaker *gobreaker.CircuitBreaker[*ServiceStatus]  
    BackoffLevel int  
    LastStateChange time.Time  
}  
**Plugin Manager Registry:**  
type PluginManager struct {  
    plugins map[string]*ManagedPlugin  
    mu      sync.RWMutex  
}  
## [**13.4 Konfigurasi per Plugin**]()  
agent:  
  plugins:  
    circuit_breaker:  
      enabled: true  
      defaults:  
        consecutive_failures: 5     # Trip setelah 5 kegagalan berturut  
        initial_timeout: "60s"      # Durasi OPEN pertama  
        max_timeout: "15m"          # Durasi OPEN maksimum  
        half_open_max_requests: 1   # Request diizinkan saat HALF-OPEN  
        reset_after: "5m"           # Reset backoff jika CLOSED > 5 menit  
      overrides:  
        mysql:  
          consecutive_failures: 3   # MySQL lebih sensitif  
          initial_timeout: "30s"  
        docker:  
          consecutive_failures: 10  # Docker lebih toleran  
          max_timeout: "30m"  
## [**13.5 Monitoring & Reporting**]()  
**Metrics yang dilaporkan ke Hub via telemetry:**  
| | |  
|-|-|  
| **Metric** | **Deskripsi** |   
| plugin_cb_state | State saat ini (closed=0, half_open=1, open=2) |   
| plugin_cb_consecutive_failures | Jumlah kegagalan berturut-turut |   
| plugin_cb_total_trips | Total berapa kali circuit di-trip |   
| plugin_cb_last_trip_timestamp | Kapan terakhir circuit di-trip |   
| plugin_cb_backoff_level | Level backoff saat ini (1-N) |   
**Dashboard Alert Rules:**  
- Jika plugin dalam state OPEN lebih dari 30 menit → Warning alert ke admin  
- Jika lebih dari 3 plugin dalam state OPEN di satu agent → Critical alert  
- Jika circuit breaker trip rate meningkat tiba-tiba di banyak agent → Possible outage alert  
## [**13.6 Interaksi dengan Service Discovery**]()  
Saat circuit breaker dalam state OPEN:  
- Plugin tidak melakukan service discovery polling  
- Status service di Hub ditampilkan sebagai "Unavailable (Circuit Open)" — bukan "Down"  
- Hub tahu bahwa agent sengaja menghentikan upaya, bukan karena koneksi terputus  
- Saat circuit kembali CLOSED dan service terdeteksi, status otomatis di-update  
## [**13.7 Langkah Implementasi**]()  
1. Tambahkan dependency sony/gobreaker ke go.mod agent  
2. Refactor PluginManager untuk membungkus setiap plugin dengan ManagedPlugin struct  
3. Implementasikan circuit breaker wrapper pada method Discover(), Status(), dan Health()  
4. Implementasikan exponential backoff logic untuk OPEN state timeout  
5. Tambahkan circuit breaker metrics ke telemetry reporting  
6. Buat konfigurasi per-plugin override di config YAML  
7. Update dashboard Hub untuk menampilkan circuit breaker status per plugin per agent  
8. Testing: simulasi service down/up, verifikasi state transitions dan CPU saving  
## [**13.8 Prioritas & Estimasi**]()  
**Prioritas:** Medium — dampak terasa saat agent mengelola banyak service heterogen.  
**Estimasi Effort:** 1 sprint (circuit breaker wrapper + monitoring integration + testing).  
# [**Lampiran A: Detail Modal Konfigurasi per Service**]()  
Lampiran ini mendokumentasikan field dan aksi spesifik yang ditampilkan di modal konfigurasi untuk setiap service yang didukung PRISM.  
*Catatan v4.0: Untuk service yang memiliki ac* *count management (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Valkey, RabbitMQ, MQTT, MinIO, Garage, SeaweedFS, vsftpd, SFTPGo), tab "Accounts" menampilkan Application Accounts (project-based / independent). Management Credentials ditampilkan terpisah di tab "Connection".*  
## [**A.1 MySQL**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Port, Socket, Data Dir, Server ID, Version, Uptime | Read-only (Descriptions) | Info dasar instance |   
| Overview | Buffer Pool Size, Threads, Connections, Max Connections | Read-only (Statistic) | Metrik performa real-time |   
| Connection | Management Credential: root user, password (masked), connection string | Read-only + Edit (otorisasi khusus) | Credential yang digunakan Agent |   
| Accounts | User list: username, host, auth plugin, default schema | Table + CRUD (Drawer) | Manajemen Application Accounts MySQL |   
| Accounts | Privileges: global, database, table level | Transfer/Checkbox dalam Drawer | Grant/Revoke per user |   
| Accounts | Kategorisasi: project / independent | Tag + Select | Assign user ke project |   
| Config | Database list: nama, size, charset, collation, tables | Table + Create/Drop | Inventory database |   
| Config | Replication: role, binlog pos, slave lag | Descriptions (Read-only) | Status replikasi |   
| Config | Backup: last backup, method, size | Descriptions + Button (trigger) | Info + trigger manual backup |   
   
*Catatan: Tab Connection menampilkan Management Credential (root/admin) yang digunakan Agent untuk mengelola service ini. Credential di-mask dan memerlukan otorisasi khusus untuk melihat.*  
## [**A.2 PostgreSQL**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Port, Data Dir, Cluster Name, Version, Uptime | Read-only | Info dasar |   
| Overview | Shared Buffers, Work Mem, Active Conns, Max Conns, WAL Level | Statistic | Metrik performa |   
| Connection | Management Credential: postgres superuser, password (masked) | Read-only + Edit | Credential Agent |   
| Accounts | Role list: name, superuser, login, conn limit | Table + CRUD | Manajemen Application Accounts (roles) |   
| Accounts | Privileges: DB ownership, schema usage, table perms | Edit (Grant/Revoke) | Permission per role |   
| Config | Database list: name, owner, size, encoding, tablespace | Table + Create/Drop | Inventory DB |   
| Config | Schema list per DB: name, owner, table count | Table + Create/Drop | Inventory schema |   
| Config | Extensions: installed, available | Table + Install/Uninstall | Extension management |   
| Config | Replication: streaming status, slots, subscriber lag | Read-only | Monitoring replikasi |   
   
## [**A.3 MongoDB**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Port, Data Path, Version, Uptime, Storage Engine | Read-only | Info dasar |   
| Overview | Connections, Memory (resident/virtual) | Statistic | Metrik |   
| Connection | Management Credential: admin user, password (masked) | Read-only + Edit | Credential Agent |   
| Accounts | User list: username, DB scope, roles | Table + CRUD | User management |   
| Accounts | Roles: built-in, custom, privilege actions | Edit | Role management |   
| Config | Database list: name, size, collections, indexes | Table + Create/Drop | Inventory DB |   
| Config | Collection list per DB: name, docs, avg size, indexes | Read-only Table | Detail collection |   
| Config | Replica Set: members, primary/secondary, oplog, lag | Read-only | Status RS |   
   
## [**A.4 Valkey**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Port, Version, Uptime, Mode (standalone/cluster/sentinel) | Read-only | Info dasar |   
| Overview | Memory Used/Peak, Clients, Keys, Hit Rate | Statistic + Progress | Metrik |   
| Connection | Management Credential: default password (masked) | Read-only + Edit | Credential Agent |   
| Accounts | ACL User list: name, enabled, commands, key patterns | Table + CRUD | ACL management |   
| Config | Persistence: RDB last save, AOF status | Read-only + Button (trigger BGSAVE) | Persistence status |   
| Config | Replication: role, connected replicas, offset | Read-only | Status replikasi |   
| Config | Keyspace: DB index, keys, expires, avg TTL | Read-only Table | Key distribution |   
   
## [**A.5 RabbitMQ**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Port (AMQP/Management), Version, Uptime, Erlang Version | Read-only | Info dasar |   
| Overview | Queues, Messages, Rate (pub/deliver), Connections, Channels | Statistic | Metrik |   
| Connection | Management Credential: admin user, password (masked) | Read-only + Edit | Credential Agent |   
| Accounts | User list: name, tags, password hash algo | Table + CRUD | User management |   
| Accounts | VHost permissions: configure/write/read regex | Edit per user per vhost | Permission management |   
| Config | Virtual Host list: name, messages, queues, connections | Table + CRUD | VHost management |   
| Config | Queue list per VHost: name, type, messages, consumers, state | Table + Create/Delete/Purge | Queue management |   
| Config | Exchange list: name, type, bindings | Table + Create/Delete | Exchange management |   
| Config | Policies: name, pattern, apply-to, definition | Table + CRUD | Policy management |   
   
## [**A.6 MQTT (Mosquitto)**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Port (MQTT/WS), Version, Uptime | Read-only | Info dasar |   
| Overview | Clients, Subscriptions, Messages In/Out, Retained | Statistic | Metrik |   
| Connection | Management Credential: admin credentials (masked) | Read-only + Edit | Credential Agent |   
| Accounts | User list: username, enabled/disabled | Table + CRUD | User management |   
| Accounts | Topic ACL: pattern, access type, priority | Edit per user | Topic access control |   
| Config | Listeners: port, protocol, max connections | Read-only | Listener info |   
| Config | Bridge: remote broker, topics, QoS, status | Read-only | Bridge status |   
   
## [**A.7 MinIO**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | API Port, Console Port, Version, Mode, Uptime | Read-only | Info dasar |   
| Overview | Total/Used/Available Storage, Buckets, Objects | Statistic + Progress | Kapasitas |   
| Connection | Management Credential: admin access key + secret (masked) | Read-only + Edit | Credential Agent |   
| Accounts | Access Key list: ID, status, created, last used | Table + CRUD | Key management |   
| Accounts | Policy per key: built-in atau custom JSON | Edit (code editor) | IAM policy |   
| Accounts | Service Accounts: parent, policy, session duration | Table + CRUD | Service account mgmt |   
| Config | Bucket list: name, size, objects, versioning, lock | Table + CRUD | Bucket management |   
| Config | Bucket Policy: public/private/custom | Edit per bucket | Access policy |   
| Config | Lifecycle Rules: expiration, transition, filter | Table + CRUD per bucket | Lifecycle management |   
| Config | Event Notification: target, events, filter | Table + CRUD | Notification config |   
   
## [**A.8 Garage**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | API Port, Admin Port, Version, Cluster Status | Read-only | Info dasar |   
| Overview | Node list: ID, hostname, zone, capacity, status | Table (Read-only) | Cluster nodes |   
| Connection | Management Credential: admin API key (masked) | Read-only + Edit | Credential Agent |   
| Accounts | Key list: ID, name, access key, status | Table + CRUD | API key management |   
| Accounts | Bucket permission per key: read/write/owner | Edit | Permission per bucket |   
| Config | Bucket list: name, size, objects, quotas | Table + CRUD | Bucket management |   
| Config | Cluster Layout: replication factor, zones | Read-only | Layout info |   
   
## [**A.9 SeaweedFS**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |

| Overview | Volumes, Free Volumes, Total Size, Volume Servers | Statistic | Kapasitas |   
| Connection | Management Credential: admin credentials (masked) | Read-only + Edit | Credential Agent |   
| Accounts | S3 Access Key: ID, secret (masked), actions | Table + CRUD | S3 key management |   
| Accounts | IAM Policy per key: bucket permissions | Edit | Policy management |

| Config | Filer Config: collections, replication, TTL | Read-only | Filer info |   
| Config | EC Status: encoded volumes, shards | Read-only | Erasure coding status |

## [**A.12 Nginx**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Port (HTTP/HTTPS), Version, Uptime, Workers, Config Path | Read-only | Info dasar |   
| Overview | Active Conns, Req/sec, Reading/Writing/Waiting | Statistic | Metrik (stub_status) |   
| Config | Site list: domain, port, root/proxy_pass, SSL, enabled | Table + Enable/Disable | Virtual host management |   
| Config | Upstream per site: backends, LB method, health check | Read-only | Reverse proxy info |   
| Config | SSL per site: issuer, expiry, auto-renew | Read-only + Tag (warning jika <30d) | Certificate monitoring |   
| Config | Config Test: nginx -t output | Button + Result display | Validasi konfigurasi |   
   
## [**A.13 Caddy**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Port (HTTP/HTTPS/Admin), Version, Uptime | Read-only | Info dasar |   
| Overview | Active Requests, Total Requests | Statistic | Metrik |   
| Config | Site list: domain, upstream/root, TLS mode, status | Table + Edit | Site management |   
| Config | Reverse Proxy: upstream, health check, LB, headers | Edit per site | Proxy config |   
| Config | TLS/Auto HTTPS: ACME, certificates, renewal status | Read-only | HTTPS status |   
| Config | Middleware: encode, rate limit, basic auth, IP filter | Edit per site | Middleware config |   
   
## [**A.14 UFW**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Status (active/inactive), Default Policy, Logging Level | Read-only + Tag | Firewall status |   
| Config | Rule list: action, direction, protocol, port, from/to, comment | Table + CRUD | Rule management |   
| Config | App Profiles: name, title, ports | Read-only Table | Application profiles |   
| Config | Enable/Disable | Switch (Popconfirm) | Toggle firewall |   
   
## [**A.15 firewalld**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Status, Default Zone, Log Denied, Panic Mode | Read-only | Firewall status |   
| Config | Zone list: name, target, interfaces, sources | Table + Edit | Zone management |   
| Config | Services per zone | Add/Remove (Transfer) | Service assignment |   
| Config | Port rules per zone: port, protocol, permanent/runtime | Table + CRUD | Port management |   
| Config | Rich Rules: family, source, dest, action, log, limit | Table + CRUD | Rich rule management |   
| Config | Reload (Runtime/Permanent) | Button | Apply changes |   
   
## [**A.16 iptables**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Active tables, Total rules per table, Kernel module | Read-only | Status dasar |   
| Config | Chain list per table: name, policy, packet/byte counters | Table + Create/Delete (custom) | Chain management |   
| Config | Rules per chain: #, target, proto, src, dst, match, comment | Table + Insert/Append/Delete | Rule management |   
| Config | NAT rules: SNAT, DNAT, MASQUERADE, REDIRECT | Table + CRUD | NAT config |   
| Config | Save/Restore: export, import | Button (download/upload) | Persist rules |   
   
## [**A.17 nftables**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Active tables, chains, rules count, ruleset size | Read-only | Status dasar |   
| Config | Table list: name, family (ip/ip6/inet/arp/bridge/netdev) | Table + Create/Delete | Table management |   
| Config | Chain list per table: name, type, hook, priority, policy | Table + CRUD | Chain management |   
| Config | Rules per chain: handle, expression, counter, comment | Table + CRUD | Rule management |   
| Config | Sets & Maps: name, type, elements, flags | Table + CRUD | Set/map management |   
| Config | Export/Import ruleset | Button (download/upload) | Ruleset backup |   
   
## [**A.18 CrowdSec**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Version, Uptime, Local API, Machines, Console Status | Read-only | Info dasar |   
| Overview | Alerts (day/week/month), Active Decisions, Top Attackers | Statistic | Security metrics |   
| Config | Decisions: IP, type (ban/captcha/throttle), duration, reason | Table + Delete (unban) | Decision management |   
| Config | Scenarios: name, status, description, event count | Table + Enable/Disable | Scenario management |   
| Config | Bouncers: name, type, IP, last pull, status | Table + Register/Delete | Bouncer management |   
| Config | Parsers: name, status, stage | Table + Enable/Disable | Parser management |   
| Config | Allow List: IP/range, reason, date | Table + CRUD | Whitelist |   
| Config | Collections: name, author, contents | Table + Install/Remove | Hub collection mgmt |   
   
## [**A.19 PM2**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | PM2 Version, Daemon PID, Node.js Version, PM2 Home Path | Read-only | Info dasar PM2 daemon |   
| Overview | Total Processes, Running, Stopped, Errored, Total Restarts | Statistic | Metrik agregat |   
| Config | Process list: id, name, mode (fork/cluster), instances, status, CPU, memory, uptime, restarts, script path | Table | Daftar seluruh proses |   
| Config | Per process actions: Start, Stop, Restart, Reload (0-downtime), Delete | Button + Popconfirm | Aksi per proses |   
| Config | Ecosystem file: path, contents (editable) | Read + Edit (code editor) | Edit ecosystem.config.js |   
| Config | Environment variables per process: key-value pairs | Table (Read-only) | Env vars proses |   
| Config | Log paths per process: stdout log, stderr log | Read-only + Link (live tail) | Path log |   
| Config | Startup script: status (enabled/disabled), init system | Read-only + Button (generate) | pm2 startup / pm2 save |   
| Config | Flush Logs, Reset Restart Count, Save Process List | Action buttons | Maintenance actions |   
   
## [**A.20 Supervisor (supervisord)**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Supervisor Version, PID, Config Path, State (RUNNING/FATAL) | Read-only | Info dasar supervisord |   
| Overview | Total Programs, Running, Stopped, Fatal | Statistic | Metrik agregat |   
| Config | Program list: name, state (RUNNING/STOPPED/STARTING/BACKOFF/FATAL), PID, uptime, group | Table | Daftar program |   
| Config | Per program actions: Start, Stop, Restart, Clear Log, Tail Log | Button + Popconfirm | Aksi per program |   
| Config | Program config: command, directory, user, autostart, autorestart, startsecs, startretries, redirect_stderr, stdout_logfile, environment | Descriptions (Read-only) | Konfigurasi dari .conf file |   
| Config | Process groups: group name, member programs, priority | Collapse + Table | Manajemen process groups |   
| Config | Reload Config (supervisorctl reread + update) | Action button | Menerapkan perubahan config |   
   
## [**A.21 systemd User Services**]()  
Khusus untuk systemd user services: PRISM hanya mengelola unit yang berjalan di scope user (systemctl --user), bukan system-wide.  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | User context: username, UID, lingering status, user unit dir path | Read-only | Info dasar user service context |   
| Overview | Total Units, Active, Inactive, Failed | Statistic | Metrik agregat per user |   
| Config | Unit list: unit name, load state, active state, sub state, description | Table | Daftar systemd user units |   
| Config | Per unit actions: Start, Stop, Restart, Enable, Disable, Mask, Unmask | Button + Popconfirm | Aksi per unit |   
| Config | Unit file content: [Unit], [Service], [Install] sections | Descriptions atau Read-only code view | Isi dari unit file |   
| Config | Unit properties: ExecStart, WorkingDirectory, Environment, Restart policy, resource limits | Descriptions (Read-only) | Properties penting |   
| Config | Journal log per unit: journalctl --user-unit=<name> | Live tail (monospace) | Log output via journald |   
| Config | Daemon Reload (systemctl --user daemon-reload) | Action button | Reload setelah edit unit file |   
| Config | Enable Lingering | Switch + Popconfirm | loginctl enable-linger agar services tetap berjalan |   
   
## [**A.22 Docker**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Docker Version, API Version, Storage Driver, Cgroup Driver, Runtime, Root Dir, Server OS | Read-only | Info dasar Docker daemon |   
| Overview | Total Containers (running/paused/stopped), Total Images, Total Volumes, Total Networks | Statistic | Metrik agregat |   
| Overview | Disk Usage: images size, containers size, volumes size, build cache size | Statistic + Progress | Penggunaan disk Docker |   
| Config | Container list: name, image, status, ports, created, networks, mounts, command | Table (filterable, sortable) | Daftar seluruh container |   
| Config | Per container actions: Start, Stop, Restart, Pause, Unpause, Remove, View Logs | Button + Popconfirm | Aksi per container |   
| Config | Container inspect: env vars, labels, resource limits (CPU, memory), restart policy, health check | Descriptions / Collapse | Detail konfigurasi container |   
| Config | Container stats (live): CPU %, Memory usage/limit, Network I/O, Block I/O, PIDs | Table (auto-refresh) | Real-time monitoring |   
| Config | Image list: repository, tag, image ID, size, created | Table + Remove (prune) | Manajemen images |   
| Config | Volume list: name, driver, mountpoint, size, used by containers | Table + Create/Remove | Manajemen volumes |   
| Config | Network list: name, driver, subnet, gateway, connected containers | Table + Create/Remove | Manajemen networks |   
| Config | Docker Compose projects: project name, services, status, compose file path | Collapse + Table | Daftar compose project |   
| Config | Compose actions: Up, Down, Restart, Pull, View Config | Button + Popconfirm | Aksi level compose project |   
| Config | System Prune: remove unused containers, images, networks, volumes | Button (Popconfirm, destructive) | Cleanup disk space |   
| Logs | Container log stream: per container, follow mode, tail lines, since/until filter | Live tail (monospace) + Select | Log viewer per container |   
   
*Docker Compose Integration: Jika * *agent mendeteksi adanya docker-compose.yml atau compose.yaml, PRISM secara otomatis mengelompokkan container yang terkait sebagai satu Compose project. Admin dapat melakukan operasi level project (up/down/restart) selain operasi level individual container.*  
## [**A.23 Podman**]()  
Podman memiliki API yang kompatibel dengan Docker, sehingga modal konfigurasinya sangat mirip. Perbedaan utama: Podman bersifat rootless by default dan mendukung pod sebagai unit pengelompokan container.  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Tab** | **Field / Informasi** | **Tipe** | **Keterangan** |   
| Overview | Podman Version, API Version, Runtime (crun/runc), Storage Driver, Graph Root, Run Root | Read-only | Info dasar Podman |   
| Overview | Total Containers (running/paused/stopped), Total Images, Total Volumes, Total Pods | Statistic | Metrik agregat |   
| Overview | Rootless mode: active/inactive, user context | Tag + Descriptions | Informasi privilege mode |   
| Config | Container list: name, image, status, ports, pod (jika ada), created, networks, mounts | Table (filterable, sortable) | Daftar container |   
| Config | Per container actions: Start, Stop, Restart, Pause, Remove, View Logs | Button + Popconfirm | Aksi per container |   
| Config | Container inspect: env vars, labels, resource limits, restart policy, health check, security options | Descriptions / Collapse | Detail container (termasuk Podman-specific) |   
| Config | Container stats (live): CPU %, Memory, Network I/O, Block I/O | Table (auto-refresh) | Real-time monitoring |   
| Config | Pod list: name, status, infra container ID, container count, created | Table + Create/Remove | Manajemen pods |   
| Config | Per pod actions: Start, Stop, Restart, Remove, View Containers in Pod | Button + Popconfirm | Aksi level pod |   
| Config | Image list: repository, tag, ID, size, created | Table + Pull/Remove | Manajemen images |   
| Config | Volume list: name, driver, mountpoint, size | Table + Create/Remove | Manajemen volumes |   
| Config | Network list: name, driver, subnet, connected containers | Table + Create/Remove | Manajemen networks |   
| Config | Podman Compose / Quadlet: compose file atau systemd-based container management | Collapse + Table | Jika menggunakan podman-compose atau Quadlet |   
| Config | System Prune | Button (Popconfirm) | Cleanup unused resources |   
| Logs | Container/Pod log stream | Live tail + Select picker | Log viewer per container atau per pod |   
   
# [**Lampiran B: Skema Database Lengkap**]()  
Lampiran ini menampilkan skema database lengkap PRISM v4.1, termasuk tabel-tabel baru dari rekomendasi v4.1.  
## [**B.1 Tabel servers**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | TEXT | PRIMARY KEY (UUID) | Identifier unik server |   
| name | TEXT | NOT NULL | Nama server (ditetapkan saat approval) |   
| description | TEXT |   | Deskripsi server |   
| hostname | TEXT | NOT NULL | Hostname asli dari OS |   
| ip_address | TEXT | NOT NULL | IP address server |   
| os | TEXT |   | Sistem operasi (e.g., Ubuntu 24.04 LTS) |   
| status | TEXT | NOT NULL | pending / active / unreachable / removed |   
| agent_version | TEXT |   | Versi Prism Agent yang berjalan |   
| created_at | DATETIME | DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | Timestamp pembuatan |   
| updated_at | DATETIME |   | Timestamp pembaruan terakhir |   
   
## [**B.2 Tabel services**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | TEXT | PRIMARY KEY (UUID) | Identifier unik service |   
| server_id | TEXT | FOREIGN KEY → servers(id) | Server tempat service berjalan |   
| name | TEXT | NOT NULL | Nama service (e.g., mysql, nginx) |   
| type | TEXT | NOT NULL | Tipe service |   
| version | TEXT |   | Versi service |   
| port | INTEGER |   | Port utama service |   
| status | TEXT | NOT NULL | running / stopped / error |   
| config_path | TEXT |   | Path konfigurasi utama |   
| pid | INTEGER |   | Process ID |   
| discovered_at | DATETIME |   | Timestamp pertama kali ditemukan |   
| updated_at | DATETIME |   | Timestamp pembaruan terakhir |   
   
## [**B.3 Tabel management_credentials**]()  
*Tabel baru di v4.0 yang menyimpan credential manajemen (root/admin/default) secara terpisah dari Application Accounts.*  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | TEXT | PRIMARY KEY (UUID) | Identifier unik credential |   
| service_id | TEXT | FOREIGN KEY → services(id) | Service yang di-manage |   
| credential_type | TEXT | NOT NULL | root / admin / default |   
| username_encrypted | BLOB | NOT NULL | Username terenkripsi (AES-256-GCM) |   
| password_encrypted | BLOB | NOT NULL | Password terenkripsi (AES-256-GCM) |   
| connection_params_encrypted | BLOB |   | Parameter koneksi terenkripsi |   
| last_verified_at | DATETIME |   | Terakhir kali credential diverifikasi |   
| status | TEXT | NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' | active / inactive / error |   
| created_at | DATETIME | DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | Timestamp pembuatan |   
| updated_at | DATETIME |   | Timestamp pembaruan terakhir |   
   
## [**B.4 Tabel accounts (Diperbarui)**]()  
*Tabel accounts kini hanya menyimpan Application Accounts — credential manajemen disimpan di tabel management_credentials.*  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | TEXT | PRIMARY KEY (UUID) | Identifier unik akun |   
| service_id | TEXT | FOREIGN KEY → services(id) | Service tempat akun dibuat |   
| server_id | TEXT | FOREIGN KEY → servers(id) | Server tempat akun berada |   
| username | TEXT | NOT NULL | Username akun |   
| account_type | TEXT | NOT NULL | user / service |   
| category | TEXT | NOT NULL | project / independent |   
| project_name | TEXT |   | Nama project (jika project-based) |   
| permissions | TEXT (JSON) |   | Detail permissions dalam format JSON |   
| status | TEXT | NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' | active / disabled |   
| created_at | DATETIME | DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | Timestamp pembuatan |   
   
## [**B.5 Tabel agent_certificates**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | TEXT | PRIMARY KEY (UUID) | Identifier unik sertifikat |   
| server_id | TEXT | FOREIGN KEY → servers(id) | Server pemilik sertifikat |   
| fingerprint | TEXT | UNIQUE, NOT NULL | SHA-256 fingerprint sertifikat |   
| issued_at | DATETIME | NOT NULL | Tanggal penerbitan |   
| expires_at | DATETIME | NOT NULL | Tanggal kedaluwarsa |   
| revoked_at | DATETIME |   | Tanggal revokasi (jika di-revoke) |   
| revocation_reason | TEXT |   | Alasan revokasi |   
   
## [**B.6 Tabel enrollment_keys**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | TEXT | PRIMARY KEY (UUID) | Identifier unik key |   
| key_hash | TEXT | UNIQUE, NOT NULL | Hash dari enrollment key |   
| created_by | TEXT |   | User yang membuat key |   
| expires_at | DATETIME | NOT NULL | Waktu kedaluwarsa |   
| used_at | DATETIME |   | Waktu digunakan |   
| used_by_server_id | TEXT |   | Server yang menggunakan key ini |   
   
## [**B.7 Tabel commands**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | TEXT | PRIMARY KEY (UUID) | Identifier unik command |   
| server_id | TEXT | FOREIGN KEY → servers(id) | Target server |   
| service_id | TEXT | FOREIGN KEY → services(id) | Target service |   
| type | TEXT | NOT NULL | Tipe command |   
| payload | TEXT (JSON) |   | Payload command |   
| status | TEXT | NOT NULL | pending / sent / executed / failed |   
| issued_by | TEXT |   | User yang mengeluarkan command |   
| issued_at | DATETIME | DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | Waktu command dibuat |   
| executed_at | DATETIME |   | Waktu command dieksekusi |   
| result | TEXT (JSON) |   | Hasil eksekusi |   
   
## [**B.8 Tabel telemetry**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | INTEGER | PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT | Identifier unik (auto) |   
| server_id | TEXT | FOREIGN KEY → servers(id), NOT NULL | Server sumber data |   
| service_id | TEXT | FOREIGN KEY → services(id) | Service sumber data |   
| metrics | TEXT (JSON) | NOT NULL | Data metrik dalam format JSON |   
| collected_at | DATETIME | NOT NULL | Waktu data dikumpulkan oleh agent |   
   
Index: CREATE INDEX idx_telemetry_server_time ON telemetry(server_id, collected_at);  
Index: CREATE INDEX idx_telemetry_service ON telemetry(service_id) WHERE service_id IS NOT NULL;  
## [**B.9 Tabel audit_log**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | INTEGER | PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT | Identifier unik (auto) |   
| user_id | TEXT |   | User yang melakukan aksi |   
| action | TEXT | NOT NULL | Jenis aksi yang dilakukan |   
| resource_type | TEXT |   | Tipe resource yang terpengaruh |   
| resource_id | TEXT |   | ID resource yang terpengaruh |   
| details | TEXT (JSON) |   | Detail tambahan dalam format JSON |   
| ip_address | TEXT |   | IP address pelaku |   
| timestamp | DATETIME | DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | Waktu aksi |   
   
## [**B.10 Tabel users**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | TEXT | PRIMARY KEY (UUID) | Identifier unik user |   
| username | TEXT | UNIQUE, NOT NULL | Username login |   
| email | TEXT | UNIQUE, NOT NULL | Email user |   
| password_hash | TEXT | NOT NULL | Hash password (bcrypt/argon2) |   
| role | TEXT | NOT NULL | admin / operator / viewer |   
| mfa_enabled | BOOLEAN | DEFAULT FALSE | Status MFA |   
| last_login | DATETIME |   | Waktu login terakhir |   
| status | TEXT | NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' | active / disabled / locked |   
   
Catatan: Tabel users menyimpan user internal PRISM (administrator, operator, viewer) — bukan service accounts yang dikelola melalui tabel accounts.  
## [**B.11 Tabel permissions (BARU — Rekomendasi #1: RBAC Granular)**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | INTEGER | PRIMARY KEY | Auto-increment |   
| name | TEXT | UNIQUE, NOT NULL | Format resource:action (e.g., server:read) |   
| description | TEXT |   | Deskripsi permission |   
| category | TEXT |   | Kategori grouping (Server, Service, User, dll.) |   
| created_at | DATETIME | DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | Timestamp pembuatan |   
   
## [**B.12 Tabel role_permissions (BARU — Rekomendasi #1: RBAC Granular)**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | INTEGER | PRIMARY KEY | Auto-increment |   
| role_id | INTEGER | FOREIGN KEY → roles(id), NOT NULL | Referensi ke roles |   
| permission_id | INTEGER | FOREIGN KEY → permissions(id), NOT NULL | Referensi ke permissions |   
   
## [**B.13 Tabel user_server_access (BARU — Rekomendasi #1: RBAC Granular)**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | INTEGER | PRIMARY KEY | Auto-increment |   
| user_id | INTEGER | FOREIGN KEY → users(id), NOT NULL | Referensi ke users |   
| server_group_id | INTEGER | FOREIGN KEY → server_groups(id), NOT NULL | Referensi ke server_groups |   
| permission_id | INTEGER | FOREIGN KEY → permissions(id), NOT NULL | Permission spesifik untuk resource |   
| granted_by | INTEGER | FOREIGN KEY → users(id) | User yang memberikan akses |   
| granted_at | DATETIME | DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | Timestamp pemberian akses |   
   
## [**B.14 Tabel server_groups (BARU — Rekomendasi #1: RBAC Granular)**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | INTEGER | PRIMARY KEY | Auto-increment |   
| name | TEXT | UNIQUE, NOT NULL | Nama grup (misal: Production-Web) |   
| description | TEXT |   | Deskripsi grup server |   
| tags | TEXT (JSON) |   | Tags untuk flexible grouping |   
   
## [**B.15 Tabel webhook_subscriptions (BARU — Rekomendasi #4: Webhook)**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | INTEGER | PRIMARY KEY | Auto-increment |   
| name | TEXT | NOT NULL | Nama deskriptif subscription |   
| url | TEXT | NOT NULL | Target endpoint URL (HTTPS) |   
| secret | TEXT | NOT NULL | HMAC-SHA256 signing secret |   
| events | TEXT (JSON) | NOT NULL | Array event types yang di-subscribe |   
| is_active | BOOLEAN | DEFAULT TRUE | Enable/disable tanpa delete |   
| failure_count | INTEGER | DEFAULT 0 | Consecutive failure counter |   
| max_retries | INTEGER | DEFAULT 5 | Jumlah maksimal retry |   
| created_by | INTEGER | FOREIGN KEY → users(id) | User yang membuat |   
| created_at | DATETIME | DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | Timestamp pembuatan |   
   
## [**B.16 Tabel webhook_deliveries (BARU — Rekomendasi #4: Webhook)**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | INTEGER | PRIMARY KEY | Auto-increment |   
| subscription_id | INTEGER | FOREIGN KEY → webhook_subscriptions(id), NOT NULL | Referensi ke subscriptions |   
| event_type | TEXT | NOT NULL | Tipe event yang dikirim |   
| payload | TEXT (JSON) | NOT NULL | Request body yang dikirim |   
| response_status | INTEGER |   | HTTP status code respons |   
| response_body | TEXT |   | Response body (truncated ke 1KB) |   
| attempt | INTEGER | DEFAULT 1 | Percobaan ke-n |   
| delivered_at | DATETIME | DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | Timestamp delivery attempt |   
| status | TEXT | NOT NULL | success / failed / pending |   
   
## [**B.17 Tabel configuration_snapshots (BARU — Rekomendasi #5: Drift Detection)**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | INTEGER | PRIMARY KEY | Auto-increment |   
| server_id | INTEGER | FOREIGN KEY → servers(id), NOT NULL | Server yang di-snapshot |   
| service_name | TEXT | NOT NULL | Nama service (nginx, postgresql, dll) |   
| config_hash | TEXT | NOT NULL | SHA-256 hash dari konfigurasi |   
| config_data | TEXT (JSON) | NOT NULL | Konfigurasi aktual terstruktur |   
| captured_at | DATETIME | DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | Timestamp pengambilan snapshot |   
   
## [**B.18 Tabel drift_events (BARU — Rekomendasi #5: Drift Detection)**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | INTEGER | PRIMARY KEY | Auto-increment |   
| server_id | INTEGER | FOREIGN KEY → servers(id), NOT NULL | Server yang mengalami drift |   
| service_name | TEXT | NOT NULL | Service yang drift |   
| severity | TEXT | NOT NULL | critical / warning / info |   
| drift_details | TEXT (JSON) | NOT NULL | Detail perbedaan (key, expected, actual) |   
| status | TEXT | NOT NULL | detected / acknowledged / remediated / ignored |   
| detected_at | DATETIME | DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | Timestamp deteksi |   
| resolved_at | DATETIME |   | Timestamp resolusi (nullable) |   
| resolved_by | INTEGER | FOREIGN KEY → users(id) | User yang menyelesaikan (nullable) |   
   
## [**B.19 Tabel retention_policies (BARU — Rekomendasi #6: Data Retention)**]()  
| | | | |  
|-|-|-|-|  
| **Kolom** | **Tipe** | **Constraint** | **Keterangan** |   
| id | INTEGER | PRIMARY KEY | Auto-increment |   
| data_type | TEXT | NOT NULL | telemetry / audit / command / webhook / snapshot |   
| hot_days | INTEGER | NOT NULL | Hari penyimpanan resolusi penuh |   
| warm_days | INTEGER | NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 | Hari penyimpanan downsampled (0 = skip) |   
| cold_days | INTEGER | NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 | Hari penyimpanan archived (0 = skip) |   
| is_global | BOOLEAN | DEFAULT TRUE | Berlaku global atau per-server |   
| updated_at | DATETIME | DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP | Terakhir diubah |   
| updated_by | INTEGER | FOREIGN KEY → users(id) | User yang mengubah |
